app.name: Overwolf Status Monitor
app.short_description: Shows whether Overwolf game-events data is stable or unstable for the overlays OP.GG depends on.
app.long_description: Polls Overwolf's public game-events status endpoints and shows, at a glance, whether the Overwolf data behind OP.GG's TFT / LoL / Valorant overlays is currently stable. Helps support agents quickly tell users whether an overlay problem is an Overwolf-side data issue.
app.installation_instructions: Live status needs no configuration. To enable 'status at ticket creation time', set History data base URL to the raw GitHub data folder of your overwolf-status-history repo (e.g. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OWNER/REPO/main/data).

historyBaseUrl.label: History data base URL
historyBaseUrl.helpText: Raw GitHub URL of the overwolf-status-history /data folder, e.g. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OWNER/REPO/main/data . Leave blank to disable the historical lookup panel.
